subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: When the Blessed Beauty was sent to Baghdad and 'Akka, the people responsible were certain that the Cause would be wiped out
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی که جمال مبارک را ببغداد و عکا فرستادند یقین نمودند که این امر بکلی محو خواهد شد
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution
